title: Laser's Remodel Pack [Cobblemon]
description: Remodels a small handful of Pokémon for consistency with Laser's Fakemon Pack.
body:
![meloettas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5ac5250d3cb81ca6995156ae732f1a87570b9c3.png)

Laser's Remodel Pack isn't anything fancy, its a simple Resourcepack that remodels Lilligant, Meloetta, and Meloetta (Pirouette) to match the models of their counterparts in [Laser's Fakemon Pack!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lasers-fakemon-pack) Needs no datapacks, mods, or other addons, its just a resourcepack.
